testcase.name: test_intentional_failure_visualization_title

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Trend Visualization' == 'Heatmap Visualization'

testcase.failure:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="9ba3a5d33bd52e1856cd39230250fd02")> e2e_url = 'file:///D:/FYP/tests/e2e/fixtures/mock-fyp-app.html'
def test_intentional_failure_visualization_title(browser, e2e_url): browser.get(e2e_url)
browser.find_element(By.ID, "predict-btn").click()
chart_title = WebDriverWait(browser, 5).until( EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "chart-title")), )
> assert chart_title.text == "Heatmap Visualization" E AssertionError: assert 'Trend Visualization' == 'Heatmap Visualization' E E #x1B[0m#x1B[91m- Heatmap Visualization#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E ? ^ ^^^^^#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E #x1B[92m+ Trend Visualization#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E ? ^^ ^^#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m
